title: Turkish Stuffed Aubergine
description: A flavorful and nutritious Turkish dish, this recipe combines the sweetness of aubergine with the savory flavors of robust spices.
instructions: 2. Cut the aubergines in half lengthwise and scoop out the insides, leaving a shell about 1/2 inch thick.
3. In a bowl, mix together the chopped red pepper, spring onions, pilaf, salt, and black pepper.
4. Stuff each aubergine shell with the pilaf mixture, dividing it evenly.
5. Brush the tops of the aubergines with olive oil.
6. Place the stuffed aubergines on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until the aubergines are tender and the tops are golden brown.
8. Serve hot, garnished with additional chopped spring onions if desired.
